image:image.image:title: Rentova - India's #1 Smart Subscription & Rental Platform
image:image.image:caption: Stop buying, start subscribing. Rent premium furniture, appliances, and tech in India with zero liability.

image:image.image:title: Rentova Official Logo - The Circular Economy Engine
image:image.image:caption: Rentova official brand logo. The ultimate Furlenco and Rentomojo alternative.

image:image.image:title: Sourav Kumar Ghosh - Founder and CEO of Rentova Intelligence
image:image.image:caption: Sourav Kumar Ghosh, System Architect and visionary founder of Rentova, recognized by DPIIT and incubated by 18Startup.

image:image.image:title: DPIIT Recognized Startup India - Rentova
image:image.image:caption: Rentova is an officially recognized innovative startup by the Government of India (DPIIT).

image:image.image:title: 1 BHK Full Furniture & Appliance Package on Rent
image:image.image:caption: Rent a complete 1 BHK setup including bed, mattress, sofa, fridge, and washing machine. Free delivery & setup.

image:image.image:title: 2 BHK & 3 BHK Luxury Family Furniture Subscription
image:image.image:caption: Premium home furnishing rentals for 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartments. Upgrade your lifestyle effortlessly.

image:image.image:title: Work From Home (WFH) & Student Studio Kits
image:image.image:caption: Rent ergonomic office chairs, standing desks, study tables, and bachelor essential kits online.

image:image.image:title: Rent Smart Appliances - Fridge, Washing Machine, AC
image:image.image:caption: Subscribe to double-door refrigerators, front-load washing machines, split ACs, and 4K Smart TVs.

image:image.image:title: Rent Sony PS5, Xbox, and Gaming Tech
image:image.image:caption: Rent the latest Sony PlayStation 5, Xbox consoles, and VR headsets on flexible monthly plans.

image:image.image:title: Rent Apple MacBook Pro & Windows Laptops
image:image.image:caption: High-performance MacBook and laptop rentals for students, freelancers, and IT professionals.

image:image.image:title: Rent Home Gym Equipment & Treadmills
image:image.image:caption: Rent motorized treadmills, cross-trainers, and home gym equipment. Stay fit without the high upfront cost.

image:image.image:title: Rentova Custom Package Builder
image:image.image:caption: Build your own custom furniture and appliance rental package. Select exactly what you need.

image:image.image:title: Rentova B2B Partner Network & Yield Engine
image:image.image:caption: Connect your supply chain via API. Zero marketing CAC, guaranteed yield for furniture manufacturers and OEMs.
